_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, maintaining service quality as data volume, consumer count, and pipeline complexity increase.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.551), TF-A-004 (TF, cosine: 0.549).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.625). Shared vocabulary: [design, operational]. DCWF-only terms [perform] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, growth] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.915, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.069 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Perform operational design." and "Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, m" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.594 ≈ STS 0.625 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design, operational] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [design, operational]. DCWF-only: [perform]. WIDAI-only: [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, growth].
